title: TSE developer tools
subtitle: Development-only diagnostics, synthetic probe traffic, config validation, and non-fiscal test data.
trafficHint: Creates synthetic health samples (not fiscal receipts). Max 1000.
testDataHint: Seeds health samples and a sample incident. Never writes payments or signature-chain rows.
devOnly: These tools are only available when the API runs in Development.
disabledEnv: Developer tools are disabled in this environment.
emptySelect: Select a tenant to use developer tools.
forbidden: You do not have permission to view this page.
